lessons.description: Model/version changes are best proven from the chat composer model picker with the exact model label visible.

steps: Open or keep the Agents app visible.
Open the model picker dropdown and keep it open.
Verify the exact model/version label is visible before capture.

lessons.description: Agent skill changes should land on the selected agent's Skills tab or the delete-skill confirmation if the story asks for deletion.

steps: Open or keep the Agents app visible.
Select a seeded agent if the app asks for one.
Open the Skills or My Skills tab.
For delete stories, create one demo skill if empty, then open the delete confirmation dialog.

lessons.description: Process output, run, and event changes need the process sidekick/run detail visible, not only the workflow canvas.

steps: Open or keep the Processes app visible.
Open the run detail, node events, or output sidekick surface.
Expand the relevant event/output row if the proof text is hidden.
forbiddenPhrases: No output persisted for this node

lessons.description: Feedback changes with comments, votes, or triage should show the selected feedback thread, not the empty board or selector prompt.

steps: Open or keep the Feedback app visible.
Select the seeded feedback item that best matches the story.
Keep the thread/comments area visible before capture.
forbiddenPhrases: Select a feedback item to view comments

lessons.description: Notes changes should show the selected note editor with the seeded note title/content visible.

steps: Open or keep the Notes app visible.
Select the seeded note that matches the story.
Keep the editor title and body visible before capture.
